Re: Request for opinion on Behalf of
Clty Council Member Robert Chamberlin (City of Coronado)
Dear Commission:
The city of Coronado wiII soon consider a proposed program
regarding the designation of streets to carry the Cityts traffic
through various areas of the City. 
This program will be the
Traffic Circulation Element of Coronadors General Plan. For each
area of the city, alternative routes will be considered for various
1eve1s of traffic. 
Please provide your advice in the following
context:
Background
A. 
Councilmember Chamberlin has a financial interest in real
property located within one of the rir{as ("SUBJECT AREA") to be
addressed in the program. His real property:
f . 
i-ronts on one oi the possible routes (TTROUTE A'r) being
considered for the SUBJECT AREA; and
2. 
fs within 300 feet of another possible route (TTROUTE Bt')
for the SUBJECT AREA.
B. 
The leve1 of traffic 
on ROUTE A within the SUBJECT AREA will
affect Councilmember Chamberlinrs real property interest in a
manner that wiII be distinguishable from the effect of traffj-c on
ROUTE A on the real property interests of the public generally.
C. 
The levet of traffic 
on ROUTE B within the SUBJECT AREA will
have an undetermined effect on Councilrnember Chamberlinrs real
property interest.
t.o
l\)


Fair PoIiticaI Practices Commission
city of coronado
March 9, 1992

D. 
Any financial effect from the selection of
traffic 
for routes in other areas of the City will
Councilmember chamberlints real property interest and
segment of the public generally.

Questions
1, 
If the program i.s considered by the City Council on a City-
wide basis, can Councilnember chamberlin participate?
2. 
If the program is considered in segrnents (on an area-by-area
basis) by the city council-:
If councilmember Charnberlin disqualifies hinself from
participating in the selection of routes for traffic 
in
the 
SUBJECT AREA, nay Councilmember Charnberlin
participate in the selection of routes for traffic 
in
areas of the city other than the SUBJECT AREA?
Can Councilnember chanberlin participate in the decision
regarding RoUTE B in the SUBJECT AREA so long as the
decision has no financial effect on his real property
interest?
can councilmember Chanberlin participate in the decision
regarding RoUTE B in the SUBJECT AREA if the financial
effect 
on his 
real 
property 
interest 
is 
not
distinguishable from the effect on the real property
interests of the public generally?
The proposed prograrn will be pending before the city Council
in the very near future. 
Your tirnely response will 
be of
considerable assi.stance.
RWK: mar
cc: City Manager
a.
b.
b.
Yours truly,
Attorney
ty of Coronado
